description_long: This rifle features a robust, tactical design with a matte black finish and a bipod for stabilized firing. It is equipped with a telescopic scope mounted on the top rail, enhancing long-range accuracy, and a secondary angled foregrip for improved handling. The stock is solid and ergonomic, designed for shoulder support, while the pistol grip is textured for a secure hold. A detachable box magazine is visible beneath the receiver, and the barrel is long and standard, ending with a flash hider. The rifle's construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, giving it a modern, military-grade appearance.
description: A tactical black rifle with a scope, bipod, detachable box magazine, and ergonomic stock, designed for stability and precision.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bipod legs, barrel end, and the alignment of the scope and foregrip.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the rifle, scope, magazine, stock, and bipod.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the stock, pistol grip, and the back of the scope.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rifle's profile, including the scope, magazine, and bipod.
